sourceRefs.fallbackText: RFC 8259 JSON December 2017 1.3 . Introduction to This Revision In the years since the publication of RFC 4627 , JSON has found very wide use. sourceRefs.fallbackText: RFC 8259 JSON December 2017 8.2 . Unicode Characters When all the strings represented in a JSON text are composed entirely of Unicode characters [ UNICODE ] (however escaped), then that JSON text is interoperable in the sense that all software implementations that parse it will agree on the contents of names and of string values in objects and arrays.
